name: delete_clock_networks_results
short_description: Clear a set of clock networks results from memory
full_help:
delete_clock_networks_results

Description: 
Clear a set of clock networks results from memory

Syntax: 
delete_clock_networks_results  [-quiet] [-verbose] <name>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Name for the set of results to clear

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
